---
title: "Figure 5 (R vs IR, GAUSSIAN frame) bias lines — predicted (GDIB) and empirical"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Gaussian-frame twin of figure_5_RvsIR_bias_lines. PREDICTED bias = Gaussian distortion-induced bias
(GDIB) from battery_sim_G (figures/data/1c2ae6f), anchored on the PSD Gaussian Fisher G_b at theta_sim
-> no FD 0-sentinels (fills macro_R once its N_ch=10 run lands). EMPIRICAL bias = per-recording MLE cloud
(mle_cloud_runs, group_size=100), already complete at N_ch=10 for R and IR.
Signed bias (log10 units) -> LINEAR y, 0 = unbiased. Colour = ALGORITHM, facet parameter x N_ch (10 | 100),
noise 0.1, x = Delta t * k_off. 95% ribbon + 68% bar.
NOTE (2026-07-10): macro_R N_ch=10 battery_sim_G still running (slowest); until it lands the PREDICTED
N_ch=10 column shows IR only. EMPIRICAL is complete. Re-render to fill predicted R when the file appears.
TWO PDFs, ONE Rmd.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR   <- "../data/1c2ae6f"
NSIM       <- 10000
NOISE      <- "0.1"
ALGOS      <- c("macro_R", "macro_IR")
NCHS       <- c(10, 100)
GROUP_SIZE <- 100
BIAS_W_MAX <- 1.5

ALGO_COL  <- c(R = "#009E73", IR = "#0072B2")
ALGO_LAB  <- c(macro_R = "R", macro_IR = "IR")
ORD       <- c("on", "off", "unitary_current", "Num_ch_mean")
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")
TRUTH_FIX <- c(on = log10(10), off = log10(100), unitary_current = log10(1))
```

```{r predicted-battery}
read_batt <- function(a) {
  files <- Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_G_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_battery_sim_G.csv", NSIM, a, NOISE)))
  if (!length(files)) return(NULL)
  map_dfr(files, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)) %>%
    filter(Num_ch %in% NCHS) %>% mutate(algo = a)
}
bsim <- map_dfr(ALGOS, read_batt)
predicted <- bsim %>%
  filter(component_path == "Probit_statistics_Gaussian_Distortion_Induced_Bias",
         statistic == "value", param_name %in% ORD,
         probit == "mean" |
           (probit == "quantile" & quantile_level %in% c(0.025, 0.16, 0.84, 0.975))) %>%
  mutate(q = case_when(probit == "mean"       ~ "bias",
                       quantile_level == 0.025 ~ "lo95",
                       quantile_level == 0.16  ~ "lo68",
                       quantile_level == 0.84  ~ "hi68",
                       quantile_level == 0.975 ~ "hi95")) %>%
  group_by(algo, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name, q) %>%
  summarise(v = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = q, values_from = v) %>%
  mutate(across(c(bias, lo95, lo68, hi68, hi95),
                ~ if_else(algo == "macro_R" & bias == 0, NA_real_, .))) %>%
  filter(is.finite(bias))
```

```{r empirical-cloud}
read_cloud <- function(a, nch) {
  path <- file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_G_nch_%d_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_mle_cloud_runs.csv", nch, NSIM, a, NOISE))
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NULL)
  dt <- fread(path, skip = 1, showProgress = FALSE,
              select = c("component_path", "sample_index", "param_name",
                         "interval_in_tau", "Num_ch", "group_size", "value"))
  dt <- dt[group_size == GROUP_SIZE]
  conv <- unique(dt[component_path == "Convergence_Status_Code" & value %in% c(0, 1, 2),
                    .(sample_index, interval_in_tau)])
  mp <- dt[component_path == "Model_Parameters_Hat" & param_name %in% ORD &
             !is.na(sample_index) & is.finite(value)]
  mp <- mp[conv, on = .(sample_index, interval_in_tau), nomatch = 0]
  mp[, truth := fifelse(param_name == "Num_ch_mean", log10(Num_ch), TRUTH_FIX[param_name])]
  mp[, b := value - truth]
  out <- mp[, .(bias = mean(b), se = sd(b) / sqrt(.N)),
            by = .(Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name)]
  out[, algo := a]
  out[]
}
empirical <- rbindlist(lapply(ALGOS, function(a) rbindlist(lapply(NCHS, function(n) read_cloud(a, n)))))
empirical[, `:=`(lo95 = bias - 1.96 * se, hi95 = bias + 1.96 * se,
                 lo68 = bias - se,        hi68 = bias + se)]
```

```{r shape}
shape_bias <- function(df) {
  as_tibble(df) %>%
    transmute(algo = factor(ALGO_LAB[algo], levels = c("R", "IR")),
              Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name, bias, lo95, hi95, lo68, hi68,
              param = factor(param_name, levels = ORD, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD])),
              Nch   = factor(paste0("N[ch] == ", Num_ch), levels = paste0("N[ch] == ", NCHS)))
}
pred_d <- shape_bias(predicted) %>% filter((hi95 - lo95) / 2 <= BIAS_W_MAX)
emp_d  <- shape_bias(empirical)  %>% filter((hi95 - lo95) / 2 <= BIAS_W_MAX)
```

```{r plot-fn}
plot_bias <- function(dd, title) {
  ggplot(dd, aes(interval_in_tau, bias, colour = algo, fill = algo, group = algo)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey70", linewidth = .3, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo95, ymax = hi95), alpha = .13, colour = NA) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lo68, ymax = hi68), linewidth = .45, alpha = .7) +
    geom_line(linewidth = .5) +
    geom_point(size = 1) +
    facet_grid(param ~ Nch, scales = "free_y",
               labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed, Nch = label_parsed)) +
    scale_x_log10(breaks = c(.01, .1, 1)) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = ALGO_COL, name = NULL) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = ALGO_COL, name = NULL, guide = "none") +
    labs(x = expression(Delta * t %.% k[off]), y = "bias  (log10 units)", title = title) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "top",
          strip.text = element_text(size = 8), plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
}
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 6.6, fig.height = 8.0, results = "asis"}
gP <- plot_bias(pred_d, "Parameter bias: Gaussian predicted (GDIB), 95% + 68% bootstrap")
gE <- plot_bias(emp_d,  "Parameter bias: empirical (per-recording MLEs), 95% + 68% SE, group_size = 100")
ggsave("Figure_5_RvsIR_G_bias_predicted_lines.pdf", gP, width = 6.6, height = 8.0)
ggsave("Figure_5_RvsIR_G_bias_empirical_lines.pdf", gE, width = 6.6, height = 8.0)
gP; gE
```
